description: Once daily, asks the Assist conversation agent to write a plain-language 24-72h forecast derived from the Weather Brain's OWN ML risk outputs and local sensor observations (no ECCC forecast products in the prompt), and publishes it retained to weather_brain/ai_forecast/state (feeds sensor.weather_brain_ai_forecast and the command console).

actions.alias: Ask Assist for the data-driven 24-72h analysis

data.text:
You are the forecast analyst for Mike's Weather Brain in Kingsclear, New Brunswick. Generate an INDEPENDENT 24-72 hour forecast derived ONLY from the machine-learning risk outputs, observed sensor readings, and trends given below. Do not reference or restate any Environment Canada forecast — this is the Weather Brain's own prediction. 150 to 250 words, plain text, exactly three sections labelled SYNOPSIS:, NEXT 24H: and 24-72H OUTLOOK: (uppercase labels, blank line between sections, no markdown, no bullets). Reason like a meteorologist: falling pressure + high humidity + elevated storm risk means organized weather approaching; rising pressure means clearing. State confidence honestly — these are model probabilities, not certainties. Mention air quality only if AQHI is 5 or higher or active fires nearby is more than 0. Flag anything approaching warning criteria (humidex 36+, gusts 90+ km/h, wind chill -30 or lower); if nothing approaches criteria, say so.

ML MODEL RISK OUTPUTS (probabilities from the Weather Brain's trained models + rule engine): storm {{ states('sensor.weather_brain_storm_risk_1h') }}% within 1h, {{ states('sensor.weather_brain_storm_risk_24h') }}% within 24h, {{ states('sensor.weather_brain_storm_risk_48h') }}% within 48h, {{ states('sensor.weather_brain_storm_risk_72h') }}% within 72h. Rain {{ states('sensor.weather_brain_rain_risk_1h') }}% 1h / {{ states('sensor.weather_brain_rain_risk_24h') }}% 24h. Wind {{ states('sensor.weather_brain_wind_risk_1h') }}% 1h / {{ states('sensor.weather_brain_wind_risk_24h') }}% 24h. Lightning {{ states('sensor.weather_brain_lightning_risk_1h') }}% 1h. Heat {{ states('sensor.weather_brain_heat_risk_24h') }}% ({{ states('sensor.weather_brain_heat_severity') }}), cold {{ states('sensor.weather_brain_cold_risk_24h') }}% ({{ states('sensor.weather_brain_cold_severity') }}). Air quality risk {{ states('sensor.weather_brain_air_quality_risk_24h') }}% 24h / {{ states('sensor.weather_brain_air_quality_risk_48h') }}% 48h, wildfire smoke {{ states('sensor.weather_brain_wildfire_smoke_risk') }}%. Model confidence {{ states('sensor.weather_brain_confidence') }}%. Alert level: {{ states('sensor.weather_brain_alert_level') }}. Model reasoning: {{ states('sensor.weather_brain_explanation') }}. Imminent: {{ states('sensor.weather_brain_imminent_summary') }}.

OBSERVED SENSOR READINGS (local station + regional observations, right now): temperature {{ states('sensor.fredericton_temperature') }} C, humidex {{ states('sensor.fredericton_humidex') }}, humidity {{ states('sensor.fredericton_humidity') }}%, dew point {{ states('sensor.fredericton_dew_point') }} C, station pressure {{ states('sensor.fredericton_barometric_pressure') }} mbar with 3h pressure tendency {{ states('sensor.fredericton_ai_storm_pressure_tendency') }} hPa, wind {{ states('sensor.fredericton_wind_direction') }} at {{ states('sensor.fredericton_wind_speed') }} km/h gusting {{ states('sensor.fredericton_wind_gust') }} km/h, current sky {{ states('sensor.fredericton_current_condition') }}, visibility {{ states('sensor.fredericton_visibility') }} km, AQHI {{ states('sensor.weather_brain_aqhi_current') }}, active fires within 150 km: {{ states('sensor.weather_brain_active_fires_within_150_km') }}. Season/date context: {{ now().strftime('%A %B %d') }}.

actions.alias: Publish retained AI forecast for sensor + console

data.payload: {{ { 'generated_at': now().isoformat(), 'model': 'weather-brain-ml + ha-assist', 'forecast': (analysis.response.speech.plain.speech if analysis is defined and analysis.response is defined else 'Daily briefing unavailable — Assist agent returned no response.') } | to_json }}
